pageContext.name: Han Solo in Carbonite 3oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Due to popular demand, we are excited to reveal a rectangular bar featuring a full-length Han Solo™ frozen in carbonite!  This legal tender coin is beautifully engraved and shows this greatest hero of the Rebellion frozen in carbonite. An antique finish has been applied to enhance the detail. This large 3oz silver coin is an impressive 80mm - with a supersized, themed box to match!   This is officially licensed, limited edition, and will be in high demand. Each has a Certificate of Authenticity to confirm it as legal tender and shows the coin's unique number in the mintage of 5,000.   Stocks are limited. So don't get left out in the cold!
